title: Premium Wash
description: Redeem for a premium wash upgrade that makes the car feel brand new. Great for building repeat service routines.

title: Interior Upgrade
description: Upgrade to interior detailing and turn a standard visit into a wow moment. Ideal for upsell and retention.

title: Detail Kit
description: A practical car care kit that keeps your brand in the glovebox. Great as a mid-tier redemption.

title: Service Discount
description: Discount token for maintenance that drives future bookings. Use it to increase lifetime value, not discount everything.

title: VIP Lane Pass
description: Priority lane token that feels premium and saves time. A loyalty perk that customers will genuinely value.

title: Add-On Pack
description: A small add-on pack (air freshener, wipes, etc.) that adds delight at low cost. Great for off-peak activation.
